description: AI-powered business operating system for beauty professionals. Users talk to it conversationally to manage content, marketing, follow-ups, scheduling, and reporting.
key_components: CLAUDE.md — Master AI instructions and setup wizard
agents/ — COO, Content Creator, GHL Assistant, Image Generator
config/niche-presets/ — 11 beauty industry niche knowledge files
playbooks/ — Marketing, posting, client ops strategies
funnels/ — Booking, lead capture, referral funnels
entry_points: CLAUDE.md — Read by Claude Code on session start
dashboard/index.html — Open in browser for visual dashboard
fragile_areas: CLIENT_CONFIG.md — Must be populated during setup; empty config breaks all agents
config/voice-presets/ — Missing or malformed preset breaks content generation
dashboard/index.html — localStorage key 'beauty-os-state' must be consistent
